Master Programs

Child Development and Education Program

Okan Homepage

Child Development and Education Program

MENU

In our country and in the world; Health, education, justice, social services and other areas of a multidisciplinary approach to the concept of serving the children and families being adopted and applications are planned and conducted in this direction. In terms of the healthy development of the society, the need for a Child Development Specialist among the professionals to take part in the team is of great importance.

Child Development and Education Program; normal development between 0-18 years of age, special needs, with acute and chronic diseases, vulnerable and developmental risk all areas of development of children (cognitive, language, motor / movement, social, emotional, self-care) can assess, capable developmental screening and identification developmental support / training / capable of preparing intervention programs can be assessed able to apply / child's family, "Family Centered" can give advice in accordance with the requirements of the application, working in cooperation with professionals working in this field to society highly equipped can provide superior services "child Development Specialist" aims to train.

Educational process; It is organized by taking into account the principle that our students can carry out the “Child Development” profession in national and international platforms as individuals who respect democracy and human rights, without discrimination, by considering the best interests of children, families and society.

Our students are provided with the necessary support to be able to graduate with a "Master's Degree" degree by taking qualified education from Istanbul Okan University, which is the "Closest to Business Life" university, and to step into business life with confidence. Our graduates can successfully work in health, education, justice, social services and other sectors.
